license_note: Public TrajNet++ repository; original bundled datasets may have separate licenses.
Uses ETH/UCY-style bundled original files when present; full official source should be prepared manually if needed.
Stanford Drone Dataset is commonly distributed for non-commercial research; user must review and accept official terms before download.
OpenTraj aggregates datasets with mixed licenses; prepare only sources whose terms are accepted.
Uses local AerialMPT if longer sequences exist; current bauma3 limitation remains separate.
